channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: 'Godspeed my friend': Inside the final hours of Spirit Airlines - CNBC
item.description:
1. 'Godspeed my friend': Inside the final hours of Spirit Airlines  CNBC
  2. Travel plans upended as Spirit Airlines shuts down, leaving passengers scrambling for other options  CNN
  3. ‘It's crazy what's going on.' Spirit Airlines shutdown hurting LAX travelers  NBC Los Angeles
  4. Trump Transportation Secretary Duffy announces relief for Spirit Airlines flyers, employees  Fox Business
  5. Frontier Airlines Announces Discounted Rescue Fares to Support Spirit Airlines Customers  Frontier Airlines

item.title: I was in the room for Warren Buffett's surprise interview. The mood swung from excited to grim, then hopeful. - Business Insider
item.description:
1. I was in the room for Warren Buffett's surprise interview. The mood swung from excited to grim, then hopeful.  Business Insider
  2. Berkshire annual meeting recap: Buffett says investing environment not ideal, sees 'gambling' in markets  CNBC
  3. Warren Buffett says 'we've never had people in a more gambling mood than now'  Fortune
  4. Buffett Describes Investing Environment as Not Ideal. And He's Glad Powell Is Staying at Fed.  Barron's
  5. Warren Buffett says it's important to know which deals not to take (BRK.B:NYSE)  Seeking Alpha

item.title: Gas prices are up across the country. Here's where you'll find the most expensive -- and cheapest -- gas - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
item.description:
1. Gas prices are up across the country. Here's where you'll find the most expensive -- and cheapest -- gas  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  2. Americans Spent $125 Million More on Gas Friday Than They Did a Week Ago  WSJ
  3. Oil Prices Spike, National Average Up Nearly 30 Cents in One Week  AAA Gas Prices
  4. Gas prices hit $4.39 per gallon in biggest one-day jump since Iran ceasefire announced  NBC News
  5. Gas prices surge overnight, reaching highest level since 2022  WCAX
item.source: ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

item.title: Warren Buffett asked Tim Cook to take a bow in a surprise speech at Berkshire meeting - Business Insider

item.title: Google is now a glorified venture-capital fund thanks to its SpaceX and Anthropic stakes - MarketWatch
item.description:
1. Google is now a glorified venture-capital fund thanks to its SpaceX and Anthropic stakes  MarketWatch
  2. Half of Google's and Amazon's 'blowout AI profits’ came from a stake in Anthropic—not from their actual business  Fortune
  3. Google’s business did great — its investments in other businesses did even better  Sherwood News

item.title: By staying on the Fed's board, Jerome Powell could be doing incoming Chairman Kevin Warsh a huge favor - Fortune
